title: cannabis kafiristanica
side_effects: Cannabis kafiristanica can have side effects if used improperly, such as rapid heart rate, increased blood pressure, and anxiety or panic attacks in some individuals. In rare cases, using excessive amounts can lead to psychosis, hallucinations, or even suicidal thoughts. Other potential side effects include dry mouth, red eyes, and impaired cognitive function, which can be particularly concerning for those who operate heavy machinery or drive. Prolonged use can also result in dependence and withdrawal symptoms when attempting to stop or reduce usage.
